transcript.text:
(There are people who have become very busy...)
Wow
(The reason they're reacting this way...)
(is because this is all just 1 serving(?)...)
There's so much
(The table is completely full...) It's my first time drinking so many café drinks
(The standard of bubble tea)
('amaSvin' bubble tea!)
As much as 7L!!
(How will she drink 7L...?)
(It just needs to be tasty...)
(The straw never leaves her hand...)
(Amazing taste...!) I can't stop drinking it
(The viewers are about to go crazy...)
(The amazing collab between the epitome of bubble tea, 'amaSvin' and Tzuyang)
(It starts now!)

(It's getting hot these days with the green leaves welcoming you....)
Hello, everyone
Today,
(Dessert mukbang after a while) I'm here to eat dessert
I'm here to drink bubble tea
I love bubble tea
(She was a regular when she was a student...) I came here often when I was a student
The price is inexpensive
(Clocking in after school!) I came here often after school
I heard that it's still popular among students
(It's still popular among students) They line up on their way home from school
(Let's go) I'll head inside
(Sunae Station, 'amaSvin Bubble Tea')
Hello!
(Clean and cozy inside)
It tells you how to order here

(There are 2 sizes!) You have the regular and the jumbo size, right?
(Various drinks to satisfy many tastes!)
There are 5 types of pearls?
Oh yes!
(Tapioca, nata de coco, aloe vera, konjac jelly, white pearls You can choose a variety of pearls to suit your taste!)
You can choose the sugar level and the ice level
(Starting her order) There's a kiosk here
When I was in high school,
I really liked green tea
(Tzuyang's favorite Hadong Green Tea Bubble Tea!) I always drank the green tea one
(Essential) The jumbo size
(As expected, Tzuyang...)
(+Brown Sugar Bubble Tea)
(+Strawberry Yogurt Bubble Tea)
(Choosing the pearls for strawberry yogurt bubble tea!) Konjac! I should try the konjac jelly
(+Real Lemon Bubble Ade)

(Choosing the aloe pearls!)
You can add more than one type of pearls
(+Adding nata de coco pearls)
Should I try a coffee as well?
(+Café Latte with Pearls)
(You can add pearls to coffee at 'amaSvin'!!) Tapioca pearls would go well with café latte
(Ordering the whole dessert menu...) Croquant chou too!
I ordered everything
(This is just fascinating for us...)
What is this?
At 'amaSvin', we sell
(Made with 'amaSvin' characters!) these phone grips
It's so cute, look at this! Can I take a look?
(Adorbs) So cute
Since you're here at 'amaSvin' and you're drinking more than 10,
(The manager's treat!!) why don't you choose one?

(They're all so cute, how can I choose one?) Wow, which one?
The character that will suit Tzuyang the most is
(Cutie Ddeonggu with the cow print!) Ddeonggu!
(A 27-year-old girl is very happy with the phone grip) Is this mine then? Thank you!
(Such a warm atmosphere...!) We'll make it deliciously for you
Thank you
(Removing the old grip right away...)
(So serious)
(While enjoying the cute Ddeonggu phone grip...)
(The strange receipt from a single person at 'amaSvin'...)
(Round and cute bubbles are ready!)
(Hadong Green Tea Bubble Tea)
(Real Lemon Bubble Ade)
(Strawberry Yogurt)
(Café Latte with Pearls)
(Brown Sugar Bubble Tea)

(Very busy with just one single person's order...)
('amaSvin' class, 10 drinks are complete!)
Just one jumbo size makes me full!
(Our Tzuyang ordered other desserts as well...)
('amaSvin' is here!) The jumbo size is really big!
(All the colors are so pretty!) It's usually served shaken
It's better if you stir it before you drink
All right
Wow, there's so much!
(Desserts are here) This is the croquant chou
(The first dessert, Croquant Chou)
(Winter dessert, Mini Bungeoppang)
(Oreo Brownie & Lemon Madeleine)
(3 types of scone & Croffle)
(3 types of sauce!)
As for 'amaSvin',

our bubble tea is well-known
but since we also have our own roasted coffee,
we're also known for our coffee
Especially for coffee beans,
we only use the top 7% coffee beans that scored more than 80 points in the tasting test
so once you try it, you'll want to keep drinking it
And for the yogurt,
we get our yogurt
from Joongwon Ranch in Buyeo
It's thicker than other yogurt
and you'll be able to taste a deeper flavor
(Explaining the Hadong Green Tea Bubble Tea!) And as for the green tea,
a lot of people love it
(Made with the king's green tea, Hadong green tea) We ground green tea ourselves
(The aroma is excellent...!) So it's very aromatic
Did you memorize that all?

A little....?
(So good at explaining haha)
- Enjoy - Thank you for the kind explanation...!
Until now, I haven't
(First time having 10 drinks..) really drank a lot of café drinks
The jumbo size is 700ml
I have 10 so that's 7L!
The jumbo size is so big!
I saw it earlier,
(Most basic drinks are around 3,000 won!) the milk tea with pearls
are around 3,500 won
The jumbo size is 1,200 won more
(Unbelievable price...) The price is really inexpensive
(Favorite drink) I'll try the Hadong Green Tea Bubble Tea first
(2 times the pearls?!) There are 2 times the pearls in here
(Full of pearls)

(Pearls are going in)
The green tea tastes like real green tea
It's not just a light scent
It's like those strong green teas
It does have that bitter taste
but it's not overwhelming
It's pleasant
The pearls!
Since this is a bubble tea place,
the pearls are so nice and chewy!
(Already finished half...) I almost finished it...
(Next up, Café Latte with Pearls!) They told me their coffee is tasty as well
(How will the coffee with pearls taste...?)
It has a very deep flavor
(Dessert you can't leave out while drinking coffee)
(A bit of the mini bungeoppang!)

It's red bean!
(Breaking away from her dislike of red bean) The red bean is yummy too
Lemon madeleine
It's sour and soft
(Next, Real Lemon Bubble Ade!)
This is nata de coco, not tapioca
Wow, this is so good!
Wow, this is the best lemonade I've ever tried!
There are both aloe pearls and nata de coco!
(Showing off the best combo with lemonade) This goes really well with the coconut jelly
The aloe jelly too
The aloe pieces
aren't small
They're big and have a nice crunchy texture
('amaSvin'... Lemonade... Noted) I should order this when I come here
(Oreo Brownie) There are Oreos in the brownie

It's like..
between a thick, gooey brownie and a soft brownie
I should finish these off
(Finishing the jumbo size...)
(Clearing one more...)
(Cleared the Café Latte with Pearls)
(Trying the croquant chou!)
(Clumsy girl who gets it on her mouth)
(Cleared the Real Lemon Bubble Ade)
I have the Strawberry Yogurt and the Strawberry Latte
(Strawberry Yogurt made with yogurt from Joongwon Ranch!) I thought it'd be like thick yogurt
but it's not
It's not made with powder, it's made with real yogurt!
(Thumbs up)
They use a lot of good ingredients
but the price is good!

What? What kind of pearls is that?
(Konjac jelly in the Strawberry Yogurt) Is this konjac jelly?
It's not like konjac, it's more like
very soft jelly
It's really good
The yogurt is thick..!
Yummy!
It'll be good with the scone
Green onion scone
Cranberry scone, Gourmet Butter scone
Green onion... Cheese scone...?
(Makes me wonder how it tastes...) There are green onions in there!
What is this? Haha
It's good haha
(Can't escape the charm of the green onion cheese scone)
(Found something) This!

(Another good ingredient!) They use fresh milk
(Cleared the Strawberry Yogurt)
What should I eat next..?
Brown Sugar!
(It's a rule to stir it well before you drink it...!)
(1 million hearts...!!) Oh... It's so good!
It's perfect for when you need a sugar fix!
(High school girls are coming in...)
Hello!
(amaSvin's regulars, dance major high school girls)
What do you usually get from here?
- Hadong Green Tea.. - Green tea?
(Everyone like Green Tea!) Oh, right! Green Tea!
(The other two like sweet drinks!) I get chocolate drinks...
(For 'amaSvin' regulars...) Then, I'll
treat you guys today!

Thank you
(Tzuyang is so cool, gifts are here!) Ta-da! Since you said you liked green tea and chocolate
(Enjoy!) Thank you
Do you dance?
(Yes! / Yes! / Yes!)
(The faces of future Korean ballerinas!)
I feel bad that I suddenly called you over here
It's okay, it's okay
How come you don't gain weight...?
(The most basic question of innocent high school girls...) Really! I'm so curious...
I'm not sure either...
(Huh?)
Do you really eat everything..?
(She really eats everything...) Yes! I ate everything on live in the past too
You're pretty....
You're so pretty...!

Ah, why are you saying that? Haha
She'll buy it for you even if you don't say that
(LOL / Huh...? Haha)
(I'll give you phone grips as gifts!) There are cute phone grips over there,
you can take one each, it's on me!
(Polite friends) Thank you
(Polite friends) Although it's not mine haha
(I wish you all the best!) I hope you achieve all your dreams
and good luck!
(Good luck) Thank you
('amaSvin' in one hand and phone grips in the other, have a good day!) Everyone chose a different one!
They can't choose the same one
Thank you, goodbye!
I ate this when I was their age...
It's already been 10 years..
25 years for me!

(Incomparable...)
(Can't talk about age with PD...) That's right
(Back to mukbang) I have to drink Taro now!
Oh, it's so good!
Should I try croffle now?
Dipping it in the chocolate!
Croffle is the best!
(Cleared the Taro Bubble Tea!)
(So far...)
(Calculating...)
(A sip of Apple Mango Smoothie, gulp..!)
It's a sweet and delicious fruity smoothie,
but it's much better with the jelly..!
Good thing about customization is that
you can pair up pearls or jelly
with the drink based on how well they suit each other

For a sour and fruity drink,
I think coconut or aloe jelly suits the best
Strawberry Latte
(Look at the color...) So pretty!
It's my first time trying white pearls,
but it's like chewy grapes..?
It's more firm than grapes
but the tender texture reminds me of grapes
For Strawberry Latte,
white pearls are a must!
How do you feel
(What do you mean?) when you drink a 1L drink?
Most people can't drink 1L at once..
I should ask that question, not you!
How do you feel about drinking 7L?
(Tell us how you feel)

(Big eater is in silence..)
(She found something!) Milk Tea!
I love Milk Tea!
(It's a must) Pearls are the best for Milk Tea
(Great Milk Tea place!) Their Milk Tea is amazing as well!
(Pearls are suctioned into the mouth..)
It's a very large cup!
Except for Green Tea, I didn't ask for extra pearls
but there are still a lot of pearls inside!
I think you can easily drink 50 Yakult!
Maybe 20...?
20?
20 is not easy either!
(What?) No
20 is not easy!
(It doesn't matter...) No, 20 is easy!

(It doesn't matter...) That's too easy!
(Why do they keep arguing over the Yakult..?) You said you can never drink 40
Why not?
(Never-ending Yakult argument...)
(6.3L done so far!!)
(The last one is Chocolate Oreo Shake!)
It's a milkshake but it's all melted
Oh, but this is really good!
I can taste the Oreo along with the chocolate flavor
(Conclusion) It's delicious, it's not bitter..
(Chocolate splash)
(I did it again..)
I finished them all!
('amaSvin' 10 kinds of bubble tea, 7L CLEARED!) The water inside of the cup is from the ice
For the dessert,
(Good idea...) I'll just ask for a container, I had too much sugar

(She drank them all...)
I'm shocked that you actually finished them all...!
(Where did they all go...?) How can they all go in?
We're working on our new drink, do you want to try it?
(Testing a new drink with Tzuyang!)
Oh, I'd love to!
(Firstly, huge clean-up first...)
(It's ready)
We're releasing three new iced teas
soon
The three flavors are lemon, peach, and lychee!
(Large bottle as well!) Also, they can come in a 1L drink as well!
We've already made the bases
but there are still things that we're unsure about
so it'd be great if we could try to make it with you
and give it a taste test

(It feels like..) It's like I'm in a science class
By the way, for this 1L bottle,
is this reusable?
Of course!
If you bring this in, we'll give a discount as well!
Oh? How much?
We give 1,000 won off!
1,000 won? Oh, that's a good deal
(Senior employee's first comment) That's only for these drinks
- (Proud) - Yes! It's applied only for those 1L drinks
If you have a 1L drink,
and bring this in next time,
then you can get 1,000 won off!
You sound like a preschool teacher!
(Teacher / Kid / TA)
(Are you ready?) Then shall we try it now?

Yes! Teacher!
(TA is scooping the ice...)
(Working very hard next to them...) Oh, it's not from powder...!
We use extracts!
(Shaking) It smells so good!
(Starting with) Wow, do I just pour it in?
(lemon iced tea first) Yes, you can just pour it
Wow...
It's so good, right?
It's not those typical lemon iced teas
It's very fresh like
drinking real lemon, it's totally different!
(Hehe, good to hear)
- The next one is peach iced tea! - I love peach!
Wow, it smells just like a real peach! Wait
Again, this is totally different from the typical peach iced tea

This one tastes more luxurious than the other ones..!
(Keep working, assistant!) It's better than what you can imagine!
(Yes, teacher)
(Lychee ice tea's color is so pretty!)
- It's lychee iced tea - The color is so pretty!
It's delicious
(Good, the reactions were very satisfying...)
By the way, what is this?
We blended the peach here
(This will go into the peach iced tea!) so that it could feel more fruity
- It's peach - Raspberry for lychee then?
That's right, yes!
Firstly, we add one lemon slice
for each drink
(The color becomes more pretty with raspberry..!) Oh, it's so pretty!
(Wow)

(Shake it, shake it)
Oh, it's so delicious!
Completely passed!
(Lastly, the blended peach for the peach iced tea) This is it
It definitely makes the drink more flavorful
and I like the bits
because it's quite crunchy as well..!
Wow, this 1L drink is a great idea!
For 1L drinks, we also have
(Coffee as well!) latte and iced Americano other than these 3 iced teas
(1,000 won discount...) The most important thing to remember is there is a discount as well!
(100% certain!!) I'll definitely buy it!
- Really? - Yes, I'm serious!
You had many different kinds of drinks today,
which one would you say it's your favorite?
I had Chocolate Oreo Shake last

and it didn't have the bitter taste of chocolate
so I really enjoyed it
Also, Brown Sugar Bubble Tea was really delicious!
Brown Sugar
had a very strong flavor..
We'll make a special drink for you
using the base milkshake called 'Pure Milk Shake',
Brown Sugar Bubble Tea,
and Chocolate Oreo Shake
We'll mix them all
and make a customized drink only for Tzuyang
(Looking forward to it) Thank you!
Your drink is here!
Thank you!
(Wow, everything is here!) Oh, I see Oreo and Brown Sugar
You really mixed them all here!

(Favorite + favorite) Oreo is mixed with Brown Sugar like this
That's right
(Why can't you mix it...?) I was gonna take the lid off and mix it...
(Teachers are on it) Do you want me to remove the lid?
Thank you!
You don't have this on the menu, right?
No, we don't have it
(Kind smile)
Wow...!
- It's so good...!!! - Is it good?
It's the best among all the drinks I have today!
Really?
(Is it that good? / Really??) Really?
(Teachers are coming with spoons..)
(Tasting time!) Can I try a bit?
(TA as well) Oh? It's so good!

(Wow)
People who like sweet stuff will have it, 100%!
Anyway, I really enjoyed all the drinks
that you made for me!
Firstly, because the price is reasonable,
it'll be perfect for students!
Especially, this last drink!
What should we name this?
(Tzuyang-shake coming soon...!) We can just call it 'Tzuyang-shake'
I like that!
'amaSvin' is delicious and cost-friendly!
I hope you come enjoy our drinks this summer
and show us your love, thank you!
I didn't get to speak a lot but it was so fun to watch on the side
and it was such a fascinating experience for me!
(The TA is a bit awkward but cute LOL)
I had a great time today as well!
